abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Life Leech
abilities.text: When an enemy model activates within 2" of this model, deal +1 damage to it for each model with this ability within 2" of it.

triggers.name: Gang Up
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage for each other ally within 1" of the target, to a maximum of +2.

triggers.name: They're After You...
triggers.text: If the target has a Paranoia token, it gains a Slow token. Otherwise, it gains a Paranoia token.

actions.name: Growing Sorrow
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target must have a Paranoia and a Slow token.
actions.effects: Remove a friendly token from the target to summon a Sorrow into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Creep Along
actions.effects: Move this model up to its Sp toward a friendly model in its LoS.
